findings: No justfile present - module definition incomplete

hotkeys.yaml structure is list-based, not schema-compliant

adr_violations.title: Standard Recipes Implementation

No recipe groups defined (lifecycle, info, build)
No null implementations for non-applicable recipes
adr_violations.required_action: Implement all standard recipes with proper groups and null implementations

Implement standard recipes with proper grouping
